chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1314 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.1535/2024 (151 CPC) 30.05.2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar Ali Lohar, Advocate for respondent No.8 / applicant. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Respondent No.8 has filed this application stating that the company is ready to provide compensation to petitioner in terms of order dated 24.01.2024, but the petitioner is not coming forward to receive the same. This has been disputed by learned counsel for the petitioner, however, he undertakes that tomorrow at about 12:00 midday, the petitioner would visit office of respondents No.3 or 4 for receiving the compensation. Accordingly, in view of above, listed application is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
